texts: URGENT: Your bank account has been compromised. Click here immediately to verify your identity: bit.ly/3xK9mQ2. Failure to respond within 24 hours will result in account suspension.
Dear Sir/Ma'am, This is from Army HQ IT Cell. Your email password expires today. Please update immediately at https://army-mail-reset.co/update to avoid service disruption. — IT Helpdesk

files.name: sample_phishing_email.png
files.description: Screenshot of a phishing email impersonating defence procurement
